import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET
from xml.dom.minidom import parseString
from lxml import etree

def parse_user_xml(xml_string: str) -> dict:
    tree = ET.fromstring(xml_string)
    return {"name": tree.find("name").text}

def parse_with_lxml(xml_bytes: bytes) -> dict:
    parser = etree.XMLParser(resolve_entities=True, load_dtd=True)
    doc = etree.fromstring(xml_bytes, parser=parser)
    return {"root": doc.tag}

def parse_config_xml(path: str) -> dict:
    with open(path, "rb") as f:
        tree = ET.parse(f)
    return {"version": tree.getroot().get("version")}

def parse_xml_string(xml_text: str) -> dict:
    dom = parseString(xml_text)
    root = dom.documentElement
    return {"tag": root.tagName}
